title: Pica's Giant Body Threatens the King
description: Pages 4–8 focus on pica's giant body threatens the king, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as pica's giant stone body threatens the plateau, and Zoro prepares to cut through Dressrosa itself.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Leo j

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: She's a kindhearted princess, right...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've hurt my legs~ Can you give me a piggyback ride? :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or you carry me in your arms, if you want.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: It's reared its ugly head! The Princess' selfish side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You can heal your legs by your- self, can't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You've always been quite fast; why don't we both run out of here together?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How rude!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fine. I won't run, then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What!? There it is! The PRIN- CESS' mood swings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't remember asking you to come save me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GRAAAAH! What is that supposed to mean?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just give her the damn piggyback ride! We don't have time to dilly-dally!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You really are a selfish, moody, short- tempered,

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Handful of a princess!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Leo's back :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How thick is this guy...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: The Princess is cordial to everyone except him for a reason...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Capture those drawaves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: H-How Disgraceful- Zamasu!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: This truly is of great importance! Quickly... I must report this to the young master as soon as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The young master's Calcula- Tions include the ultimate technique of the chiyu-Chiyu no mi.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The restoration power it grants at the cost of one's lifespan!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: He's counting on the fact that even if something were to happen to the smile factory,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: We would still be able to restore it to its original condition!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: th... th... there!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky vs. Senior Pink

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The Factory is in danger- Zamasu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ferrr Ranky..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Senior! You must protect it at all cost!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Dodge it, Senor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Hammer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Kuh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Fraland! It's coming again! That move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Dodge it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: MEOW meOW

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Shelex.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: GeHo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: GAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: They... they're both at their limit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You... you should be able to dodge that move, shouldn't you!? Fraland!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: You've taken that same attack 30 times now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Shut it, Contatta!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: HAA... UGH...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Why!? Senor's taken the same punch 30 times now too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: When offered a drink,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: You think a man can just pull away his glass and refuse!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: What!? Don't tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: This guy's got a huge pair on him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: And that's why I ain't gonna dodge a single one of his attacks! I'll take every single one head on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: And still come out on top!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: That's my "strong style"!

summary: Pica's Giant Body Threatens the King advances the Dressrosa story through Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
